sql_query: SELECT d.city_name AS 'Commune', SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS 'Total_Tous_Champs' FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY Total_Tous_Champs DESC;

text_query: Quels sont les 5 documents contenant le plus de résultats d'extraction ?
sql_query: SELECT d.document_id AS 'ID_Document', d.city_name AS 'Commune', COUNT(r.result_id) AS 'Nb_Resultats' FROM documents d LEFT JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id GROUP BY d.document_id ORDER BY Nb_Resultats DESC LIMIT 5;

text_query: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages selon le format du document ?
sql_query: SELECT d.format AS 'Format', AVG(d.nb_pages) AS 'Moyenne_Pages' FROM documents d GROUP BY d.format;

text_query: Combien d'exécutions d'extraction ont été lancées par état du processus ?
sql_query: SELECT s.code AS 'Etat', COUNT(e.run_id) AS 'Nb_Executions' FROM extraction_runs e JOIN states s ON e.state_id = s.state_id GROUP BY s.code;

text_query: Quelles règles de champ n'ont aucune règle de validation associée ?
sql_query: SELECT fr.extraction_rule_id AS ID_Rule_Champ, fr.safir_field_id AS Champ FROM field_rules fr WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM validation_rules vr WHERE json_valid(vr.safir_field_id_list) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM json_each(vr.safir_field_id_list) je WHERE je.value = fr.safir_field_id));

text_query: Combien de champs SAFIR distincts chaque jeu de règles couvre-t-il ?
sql_query: SELECT fr.ruleset_id AS 'ID_Ruleset', COUNT(DISTINCT fr.safir_field_id) AS 'Nb_Champs' FROM field_rules fr GROUP BY fr.ruleset_id;

text_query: Listez les résultats d'extraction avec leurs valeurs originales.
sql_query: SELECT result_id AS ID_Resultat, safir_field_id AS SAFIR_Field, value AS Valeur_Originale FROM extraction_results;

text_query: Répartition des règles de validation par niveau de problème pour chaque jeu de règles.
sql_query: SELECT vr.ruleset_id AS 'ID_Ruleset', vr.level_of_problem AS 'Niveau_Probleme', COUNT(*) AS 'Nb_Rules' FROM validation_rules vr GROUP BY vr.ruleset_id, vr.level_of_problem ORDER BY vr.ruleset_id, vr.level_of_problem;

text_query: Quels documents n'ont aucun résultat extrait pour le champ DI127 ?
sql_query: SELECT d.document_id AS 'ID_Document', d.city_name AS 'Commune' FROM documents d WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results r WHERE r.document_id = d.document_id AND r.safir_field_id = 'DI127');

text_query: Quels sont les 3 champs SAFIR avec la plus grande somme de valeurs extraites, quel que soit l'état du traitement ?
sql_query: SELECT r.safir_field_id AS Champ, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS Somme_Valeurs FROM extraction_results r GROUP BY r.safir_field_id ORDER BY Somme_Valeurs DESC LIMIT 3;

text_query: Listez les documents en succès qui contiennent un avertissement.
sql_query: SELECT d.document_id AS 'ID_Document', d.warning_message AS 'Avertissement' FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' AND d.warning_message IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '';

text_query: Quels jeux de règles ont des règles de validation qui référencent plus de 5 champs SAFIR ?
sql_query: SELECT vr.ruleset_id AS 'ID_Ruleset', vr.validation_rule_id AS 'ID_Rule_Validation', (LENGTH(vr.safir_field_id_list) - LENGTH(REPLACE(vr.safir_field_id_list, ',', '')) + 1) AS 'Nb_Champs' FROM validation_rules vr WHERE (LENGTH(vr.safir_field_id_list) - LENGTH(REPLACE(vr.safir_field_id_list, ',', '')) + 1) > 5;

text_query: Quelles sections contiennent le mot "total" dans leurs données JSON ?
sql_query: SELECT s.section_id AS ID_Section, s.document_id AS ID_Document, s.section_value AS Valeur_JSON FROM sections s WHERE s.section_value LIKE '%"total"%'

text_query: Affichez les résultats d'extraction avec un message d'erreur JSON et en état d'erreur.
sql_query: SELECT r.result_id AS 'ID_Resultat', r.safir_field_id AS 'Champ', r.message_error AS 'Message_Erreur', r.value AS 'Valeur' FROM extraction_results r JOIN states s ON r.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'ERROR' AND r.message_error IS NOT NULL;
